plan_analysis:
The pre-research context already gives forecasters:  
• The exact resolution mechanism (Yahoo Finance close on 2026-03-10 vs 2026-03-03).  
• The latest trading data, recent return path, realised volatility, analyst targets, and programmatic base-rate statistics for EXR’s own 5-day returns.

Remaining gaps a skilled forecaster will still want to cover:

Base-rate / reference class gaps  
• Longer and richer history of EXR’s 5-day moves (seasonality, 10-year sample, mean-reversion vs momentum).  
• How other self-storage REITs and the broader REIT index behave over similar 5-day windows.  
• How REITs historically react to key macro shocks scheduled for the next week (jobs report, rate moves).

Key-driver gaps  
• Historical relationship between REIT price changes and movements in the 10-year Treasury yield (cost-of-capital sensitive).  
• Historical evidence on short-term momentum reversal for S&P-500 constituents, to assess whether EXR’s strong 1-month run tilts odds down.

Current-state gaps  
• Any company-specific news between 3-Mar and 10-Mar (acquisitions, guidance, litigation, insider trades, broker rating changes).  
• Current macro backdrop: where the 10-year yield is today and whether it is trending up or down.  
• Latest sector sentiment on self-storage REITs that could trigger a group move.

Contrarian-check gaps  
• Articles painting a bearish near-term view (rate-sensitive REIT sell-offs, insider selling, negative catalysts).

Search strategy: Combine historical reference searches (Google and one Agent synthesis) with current-state / news searches (Google News, AskNews, FRED). The queries below collectively address base rates, resolution clarity, key drivers, current conditions, and contrarian information.

queries_planned.intent: find long-term statistics/graphs of EXR’s 1-week price changes for a richer base rate and seasonality checks
obtain historical 5-day return data for peers (PSA, CUBE, NSA) to benchmark EXR against its sector
locate studies/whitepapers quantifying how REIT prices move versus changes in the 10-year Treasury yield
gather academic/quant research on 5-day odds after strong 1-month gains for index constituents

queries_planned.query: Weekly price change high-momentum S&P components; distribution and probability up vs down; 2000-2025 sample
queries_planned.intent: produce a synthesized reference class showing how often a stock that just rose >8% in a month continues to rise over the next trading week
capture any fresh company-specific developments, guidance, M&A, broker actions within the forecast window
pull the current 10-year Treasury yield and its 5-day change to gauge macro headwind/tailwind for REITs right now

queries_planned.query: Self-storage REIT outlook early March 2026; rising rates impact; United States
queries_planned.intent: surface recent analytical or opinion pieces that might present a contrarian negative or positive view for the sector over the coming week
